name: Theme palette change applies and persists across navigation
description: Changing the color palette in Settings visibly recolors the UI accent, and the selection is still active after navigating away and back.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Open the Customization tab in settings
Select a color palette that differs from the current one (such as Forest or Ocean)
Verify the chosen palette becomes marked as active/selected and the page's accent color visibly changes to match the newly selected palette
Click the Home link in the sidebar to go to the dashboard
Click the Settings link in the sidebar to return
Verify the previously selected palette is still marked active — confirming the theme persisted across navigation rather than resetting to the default
